svg.style: display: block; background: rgb(26, 34, 51); cursor: default;

rect.style: filter: drop-shadow(rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.6) 0px 0px 4px); transition: x 0.3s, y 0.3s, width 0.3s, height 0.3s, fill 0.3s;

div.style: width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: rgb(11, 18, 32); border: 1px solid rgb(30, 58, 95); border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; font-family: "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif; pointer-events: none;
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 8px; background: rgb(13, 27, 46); border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(30, 58, 95); flex-shrink: 0;

select.style: font-size: 11px; background: rgb(11, 18, 32); color: rgb(226, 232, 240); border: 1px solid rgb(51, 65, 85); border-radius: 4px; padding: 1px 4px;

th.style: padding: 3px 6px; color: rgb(219, 234, 254); font-weight: 700; border: 1px solid rgb(30, 58, 95); white-space: nowrap; position: sticky; top: 0px; background: rgb(30, 64, 175);
padding: 3px 6px; color: rgb(219, 234, 254); font-weight: 700; border: 1px solid rgb(30, 58, 95); white-space: nowrap; position: sticky; top: 0px; background: rgb(30, 64, 175);
padding: 3px 6px; color: rgb(219, 234, 254); font-weight: 700; border: 1px solid rgb(30, 58, 95); white-space: nowrap; position: sticky; top: 0px; background: rgb(30, 64, 175);
padding: 3px 6px; color: rgb(219, 234, 254); font-weight: 700; border: 1px solid rgb(30, 58, 95); white-space: nowrap; position: sticky; top: 0px; background: rgb(30, 64, 175);

td.style: padding: 2px 6px; border: 1px solid rgb(22, 35, 58); font-family: monospace; white-space: nowrap; color: rgb(74, 222, 128); font-weight: 700; text-align: center;
padding: 2px 6px; border: 1px solid rgb(22, 35, 58); font-family: monospace; white-space: nowrap; color: rgb(226, 232, 240); text-align: left;
padding: 2px 6px; border: 1px solid rgb(22, 35, 58); font-family: monospace; white-space: nowrap; color: rgb(226, 232, 240); text-align: right;
padding: 2px 6px; border: 1px solid rgb(22, 35, 58); font-family: monospace; white-space: nowrap; color: rgb(226, 232, 240); text-align: right;
